mapper.select: SELECT cg.*, u.nickname AS owner_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = cg.id) AS member_count FROM chat_group cg LEFT JOIN user u ON cg.owner_id = u.id WHERE cg.id = #{id}

SELECT cg.*, u.nickname AS owner_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_member WHERE group_id = cg.id) AS member_count FROM chat_group cg LEFT JOIN user u ON cg.owner_id = u.id INNER JOIN group_member gm ON cg.id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_group (group_name, avatar, owner_id, description) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{avatar}, #{ownerId}, #{description})
